signet_eval_tool.name: Signet Evaluation Tool
signet_eval_tool.description: A standalone Python CLI tool that reads Claude Code PreToolUse hook JSON from stdin, evaluates it against user-defined policy rules from ~/.signet/policy.yaml (with built-in safe defaults), and returns allow/deny/ask decisions on stdout. Implements first-match-wins rule evaluation, secure input validation, policy file caching, fail-secure behavior for all error conditions, and provides --init command to install default policy. Single-file implementation using only Python stdlib with type hints and optimized for <15ms execution time.

contract.name: Signet Evaluation Tool
contract.description: A standalone Python CLI tool that reads Claude Code PreToolUse hook JSON from stdin, evaluates it against user-defined policy rules from ~/.signet/policy.yaml (with built-in safe defaults), and returns allow/deny/ask decisions on stdout. Implements first-match-wins rule evaluation, secure input validation, policy file caching, fail-secure behavior for all error conditions, and provides --init command to install default policy. Single-file implementation using only Python stdlib with type hints and optimized for <15ms execution time.

types.name: Decision
types.description: Policy evaluation decision with fail-secure semantics

types.name: ToolUseRequest

fields.name: tool_name
fields.description: Name of the tool being invoked

types.description: Parsed Claude Code PreToolUse hook JSON input

types.name: PolicyRule

fields.name: tool_pattern
fields.description: Regex pattern to match tool names

fields.name: conditions
fields.description: List of parameter conditions to evaluate

fields.name: action
fields.description: Decision to return if rule matches

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Explanation for why this rule applies

types.description: A single policy evaluation rule with conditions and action

fields.name: default_action
fields.description: Fallback decision when no rules match

fields.name: matched_rule
fields.description: Name of the rule that matched

fields.name: evaluation_time_ms
fields.description: Time taken to evaluate in milliseconds

functions.name: main
functions.description: Main CLI entry point that parses arguments and routes to appropriate handler

error_cases.name: PolicyInitError
error_cases.condition: Failed to create policy file during --init

postconditions: Returns 0 on success, non-zero on error

structured_side_effects.description: Creates default policy file when --init used

functions.name: parse_args
functions.description: Parse and validate command-line arguments using argparse
postconditions: Returns valid CliArgs with defaults applied

functions.name: init_policy_file
functions.description: Create default policy file at specified or standard location

error_cases.name: FileSystemError
error_cases.condition: Cannot create directories or write file

postconditions: Policy file exists at target location

structured_side_effects.description: Creates directory and writes default policy YAML

functions.name: load_policy
functions.description: Load and parse policy configuration from file with caching and fallback to defaults

error_cases.name: PolicyParseError
error_cases.condition: Invalid YAML syntax or structure in policy file

error_cases.name: RegexCompileError
error_cases.condition: Invalid regex pattern in policy rule

postconditions: Returns valid PolicyConfig with compiled regex patterns cached
Uses embedded defaults if file missing or invalid

structured_side_effects.description: Reads YAML policy or falls back to embedded defaults

functions.name: parse_hook_input
functions.description: Parse and validate Claude Code PreToolUse hook JSON from stdin

error_cases.name: ValidationError
error_cases.condition: Missing required fields or invalid field types

postconditions: Returns validated ToolUseRequest with required fields

functions.name: evaluate_request
functions.description: Evaluate tool use request against policy rules using first-match-wins logic
postconditions: Falls back to default_action if no rules match

performance_budget.complexity: O(n) where n is number of rules

functions.name: match_rule_conditions
functions.description: Check if tool request matches all conditions in a policy rule

inputs.name: rule
inputs.description: Policy rule with conditions to check

postconditions: Returns true only if all conditions match

performance_budget.complexity: O(c) where c is number of conditions

functions.name: format_output
functions.description: Format evaluation result as JSON for stdout consumption

functions.name: get_default_policy
functions.description: Return embedded default policy configuration as fallback
postconditions: Returns valid PolicyConfig with safe defaults
Default action is DENY for fail-secure behavior

invariants: Policy evaluation always completes within 15ms performance budget
All regex patterns are compiled and cached at load time
Fail-secure: unknown/error conditions default to DENY decision
First-match-wins: rules are evaluated in order, first match determines outcome
Input validation: all JSON input is validated before processing
No network access: tool operates entirely offline with local files
Policy file format is backward compatible within major versions

data_access.rationale: Reads policy configuration files from ~/.signet/policy.yaml and SIGNET_POLICY_PATH containing user-defined security rules (INTERNAL classification). Reads Claude Code PreToolUse hook JSON from stdin containing tool invocation requests with potential sensitive parameters (INTERNAL classification). Writes default policy template to filesystem during --init command. No access to PUBLIC or PII data.

side_effects.rationale: Reads security policy configuration to determine allowed/denied tool usage patterns
Creates initial policy file with safe default rules during setup
Reads tool invocation requests from Claude Code hooks for security evaluation
Returns security decisions and explanations to calling process
